Document:
# Whitelists
Certain non-human roles on Misfits Sanctuary require a whitelist application before you can play them. These roles have unique gameplay mechanics, faction interactions, and RP expectations that set them apart from standard playable roles.
## How to Apply
Visit the Misfits wiki or Discord to submit a whitelist application:
[textlink="Misfits Wiki" link="https://ss14.misfitsystems.net/wiki/index.php/Main_Page"]
## Whitelist Roles
[bold][color=#a4885c]Super Mutants[/color][/bold] FEV-mutated former humans. Physically dominant but socially complex — select Super Mutants have developed intelligence and culture, while others remain feral. See the [textlink="Super Mutants" link="MisfitsSuperMutants"] guide for full details.
[bold][color=#a4885c]Robots[/color][/bold] Autonomous machines and Institute-built Synths navigating a world that fears or exploits them. See the [textlink="Robots" link="MisfitsSynthetics"] guide for full details.
